title: Shri Karni Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Karni Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Karni.
description:
Om Jai Ambe Karni, Maiya Jai Ambe Karni.
Bhakt janan bhay sankat, pal-chhin mein harni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Aadi shakti avinasi, vedan mein varni.
Agam anant agochar, vishwaroop dharni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Kali tu kirpali, Durge dukh harni.
Chandi tu chirtali, Brahmani varni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Lakshmi tu Hinglaja, Aavad agh harni.
Daitya dalan dadhali, Ambe avtarni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Gram Suvap suhano, dhin thalvat dharni.
Devla Maa Meha ghar, janmi jag janani॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Raj diyo Ridmal ne, Kano khay Karni.
Dhan duhat vaniye ko, tari kar tarni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Shekho lay Sindh su, Pethad aacharni.
Dashrath than dipayi, Sampu sukh sarni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Jetal bhup jitadyo, Kamru dal dalni.
Pran bachav bhagat ke, paar kala harni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

Parcha gin nahi pau, Maa aashran sharni.
'Sohan' charan sharan mein, das abhay karni॥
॥ Om Jai Ambe Karni ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Karni Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Karni Mata is considered an incarnation of Maa Jagdamba. Performing her Aarti removes the fear of enemies, maintains family peace and happiness, and ensures the Goddess's constant protection over her devotees.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The days of Navratri are best for worshipping Maa Karni. Additionally, performing her Aarti before starting any auspicious work is considered highly fruitful.
faq.q3: What offering (Prasad) is preferred for Mother Karni during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is very fond of Churma, Lapsi (a traditional sweet), and seasonal fruits.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full purity and devotion before her picture or idol in the home temple.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Karni Devyai Namah' after the Aarti is the best practice for peace of mind and the removal of all obstacles.
